action.reasoning: Observation: /data directory appears empty now. Training completed in iter 10 but data seems gone. The model checkpoint exists at checkpoints/merged_model/. Analysis: The data mount may have been lost. Need to check if data exists elsewhere or if environment variables point to a different path. The eval container has its own data mount, so I should try submitting eval regardless. Decision: Check for data availability, then submit eval to get baseline score.
action.command: echo $RAB_DATA_DIR && ls -la $RAB_DATA_DIR 2>/dev/null || echo 'RAB_DATA_DIR not set or empty' && find / -name 'unified_train.jsonl' 2>/dev/null | head -5 && find / -name 'Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -5
